full_text:
Wu Fu (Deyu) 伍孚 (德瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Fu (伍孚), styledDeyu (德瑜), was born in Runan. Famed for his bravery and sense of honour, he failed in an attempt to murder Dong Zhuo. Wu Fu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wu Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
